revision.comment: Zackmann08 moved page [[Template:Infobox Chinese/Russian]] to [[Template:Infobox Russian]] without leaving a redirect: Per result of [[wikipedia:Templates_for_discussion/Log/2025_November_13%23Rename_Infobox_Chinese_subpages|tfd]]
1 revision imported: overwriting the contents of [[Template:Infobox Chinese]]
